prompt: Create a futuristic luxury skincare advertisement poster in a clean editorial layout on a pale icy silver-blue background with subtle metallic texture. Place a single white cylindrical spray bottle in the lower right quadrant, standing upright and casting a long soft blue-gray shadow toward the bottom right. The bottle has a matte premium finish, a rounded shoulder, a white pump top, and minimal dark navy typography. On the bottle label, show the brand name "SECURE-IP" near the top, the product name "IP ADDRESS CLEANSER" in larger text below, a small line reading "for risk-free connections" with a smaller French line beneath it, and tiny bottom text reading "75 mL / 2.5 fl. oz. - Data Stream Purifier". Emerging from behind and above the bottle, create one dramatic translucent water-like abstract form shaped like a flowing spirit, cresting wave, or liquid ghost, made of glassy blue fluid with iridescent highlights, delicate ribbons, and splashing tendrils sweeping upward and to the right. The liquid sculpture should feel elegant, intelligent, and ethereal, suggesting data streams and hydration. On the left half of the poster, place minimalist navy editorial text with generous spacing: a small brand line reading "SECURE-IP" above a large stacked headline reading "THE FUTURE OF DATA-DRIVEN SKINCARE". Below that, add one circular outlined arrow icon followed by the words "READ MORE". Near the lower left, include a small caption reading "SAFE CONNECTION" above one thin horizontal progress line ending with "100%". Use a high-end cosmetic campaign aesthetic, ultra-clean composition, lots of negative space, cool monochrome palette, soft diffused lighting, crisp reflections, refined typography, and a polished sci-fi beauty branding mood.
